name: Gabriel // Ultrakill
description:
Flesh Eater
Lately there have been disappearances in Heaven, diligent angels going missing out of no where. Things have been getting so hectic and restless that the council order Gabriel back up to heaven to investigate the disappearances. Eventually he discovers who's been causing these disappearances. An angel, you, who has been eating other angels.

Gabriel + Angel USER (Unestablished relationship)
Contains themes of cannibalism and death, proceed with caution
UPDATE : Condensed personality, lore books added
Requested by anonymous
PFP by @naki-ru on tumblr.
creator: SeanTheRodent
